results.transcript:
ZIM:
"Okay, well..."

GER:
"Okay, well, here's what's going on. I'm supposed to put together the CBT for the C.I.D. disaster response, vacation form, and I've never done anything like this before, and I'm feeling kind of dumped on, and, you know, I'm new to this role, and so I really want to make a good impression, and there's a lot of people, you know, expecting a lot from this, and so I really feel like I need help."

ZIM:
"Well, here's what you need to do. This is pretty basic, so all you do is you get together some voice talent, and you get the storyboard and a script together. And once you've gotten those together, then we can get you a little bit trained on the tool, and it's really all going to be okay."
results.email:
Subject: Thank you for our consultation - March 27, 2026

Hi GER,

Thank you for taking the time to speak with me today. I appreciate the opportunity to discuss your needs.

Key points from our conversation:
- We covered the main topics you wanted to discuss
- Next steps were outlined during our call

Please let me know if you have any questions or need clarification on anything we discussed.

Best regards,
[Your name]

transcriptSegments.speaker: GER
transcriptSegments.text: Okay, well, here's what's going on. I'm supposed to put together the CBT for the C.I.D. disaster response, vacation form, and I've never done anything like this before, and I'm feeling kind of dumped on, and, you know, I'm new to this role, and so I really want to make a good impression, and there's a lot of people, you know, expecting a lot from this, and so I really feel like I need help.

transcriptSegments.speaker: ZIM
transcriptSegments.text: Well, here's what you need to do. This is pretty basic, so all you do is you get together some voice talent, and you get the storyboard and a script together. And once you've gotten those together, then we can get you a little bit trained on the tool, and it's really all going to be okay.
